title: Kemise Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kemise with a Z-Score of +4.31. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Kemise has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme temperatures. 
 The low humidity of 17% and moderate wind speed of 10.8 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 14.1 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, showing the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
